data.body: AC1 credential-verified (2026-07-11): the rebar-gerrit-alerts SNS email subscription to joeoakhart@navapbc.com is CONFIRMED and delivering — get-subscription-attributes returns PendingConfirmation=false (SubscriptionArn arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:896586841071:rebar-gerrit-alerts:1ce0a8bd-b7ac-4256-bea6-87889af05993). The pending-confirmation risk that spawned this ticket is resolved; AC1 is met without needing a confirmation-free replacement sink.
